Economy.Lifetime_GP_Average: Float // Global average progression across all goals

User_Profile.Is_Vice_Survey_Completed: Boolean // Phase 9: single-use lifecycle flag; true after Hidden Vices survey is submitted and persisted

Goal.Creation_Date: DateTime // Phase 14: audit timestamp set at Goal creation time; uses CURRENT_TIMESTAMP default for legacy rows
Goal.Start_Date: DateTime // Phase 14: user-chosen Monday (first Monday of or after the goal's start week); stored directly, not calculated

Goal_Refinement_Answers.RankOrder: Integer // Display order as returned by Gemini prompt2 (1–3)
Goal_Refinement_Answers.Question: String // Question text generated by Gemini; max 500 chars
Goal_Refinement_Answers.Answer: String? // User's text response; null until filled in during onboarding

OnboardingProgressCache.UserID: Guid? // Nullable FK to User_Profile; NULL until UserProfile is created
OnboardingProgressCache.Validated_Goal_Json: String? // Phase 5 staging: raw JSON returned by Gemini prompt1; cleared to NULL after Goal is committed
OnboardingProgressCache.Refinement_Questions_Json: String? // Phase 5 staging: raw JSON array returned by Gemini prompt2; cleared to NULL after Goal is committed
OnboardingProgressCache.Refinement_Answers_Json: String? // Phase 6 bug-fix: persists user's typed refinement answers across process restarts; cleared to NULL after Goal is committed
OnboardingProgressCache.Chosen_Start_Date: DateTime? // Phase 14: the Monday chosen by the user in the date picker; cached here so FinalizeGoal and GenerateHabits can use it without re-prompting
OnboardingProgressCache.Goal_Id: Guid? // Phase 17/18: set by FinalizeGoalCommand when the Goal is created; identifies which Goal this session is building a schedule for; also serves as the blueprint cache key — if BlueprintJson is non-null, it belongs to this Goal
OnboardingProgressCache.Blueprint_Json: String? // Phase 16: intermediate output of prompt 2.1; non-null means the blueprint for Goal_Id is already cached and prompt 2.1 can be skipped on retry

Global_Metrics.Total_Weekly_SP_Earned: Integer // SP isn't penalised by goals, so it can stay global

Week_Goal_Items.Week_GoalID: Guid // Primary Key for this junction record
Week_Goal_Items.Week_Goal_Number: Integer // Phase 10: 1-based sequence counter for this goal's weeks; independent of global Week_Number

Metrics.Goal_Weekly_GP: Float // The strict evaluation metric for THIS specific goal
Metrics.Goal_Weekly_XP_Earned: Integer // Tracked here so it can be independently slashed by 50% or 100% during probation

Habit.Week_GoalID: Guid // FK linking directly to the specific Goal's week state
